name: Corn Chowder
recipeIngredient: 2 cups corn kernels, fresh if possible
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a soup pot.
2. Saute the onion until it becomes soft.
3. Add the potatoes and water to the pot.
4. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to medium.
6. Simmer for 30-40 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
7. Add the corn and cream.
8. Heat through, stirring frequently, for ten minutes.
